source.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex

retrieval.method: HTTPS GET of the official OpenAI output=1 URL with curl following redirects and a desktop browser User-Agent
retrieval.notes: At retrieval time, the canonical URL and non-trailing-slash query variant returned a Cloudflare HTTP 403 challenge in this environment. The exact trailing-slash output=1 variant returned the complete server-rendered official page with HTTP 200 when requested with a desktop browser User-Agent.

extraction.method: Python lxml parsing of the server-rendered article element, with explicit Markdown conversion for headings, paragraphs, lists, links, emphasis, and the line-numbered preformatted task-environment tree
extraction.scope: Complete article body from the subtitle through the contact link; navigation, scripts, sharing controls, taxonomy links, author card, related-content cards, and site chrome excluded
verified_sections: 1. A practitioner correction reveals a failure
2. Product traces turn corrections into evals
3. The finding becomes a hill to climb for Codex
How to use Codex to build this loop
extraction.notes: The extraction was inspected from beginning through end. It preserves all article prose and list items plus the full 36-line task-environment tree. Decorative figures were represented upstream by captions in the server-rendered article and those captions are retained; visual pixel content is not reproduced. This artifact is verifiable source evidence, not a deep review or endorsement of the article's causal, accuracy, productivity, or self-improvement claims.
